productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed Pink T-shirt
description: Composition Pink T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and grunge look graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The grunge look graphic print on the front spells out the essentials of a great life, "Love, party, music, rock and roll, laughter", while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
